evals.prompt: Can you write up a short doc explaining how the email reminder scheduling works in this repo (subscription-tracker)? Cover when reminders fire, how duplicates are prevented, and how the test-send works. Save it somewhere I can read through it.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained styled .html page (not a .md file) explaining the send-reminders Edge Function: reminderOffsets windows, reminder_log idempotency, test:true path.
assertions: Deliverable is a .html file, not a .md file
HTML is self-contained: no external http(s) stylesheet/script/font references
Page includes styling with a dark-mode (prefers-color-scheme) variant
Content covers reminder offsets/window, reminder_log idempotency, and the test-send path

evals.prompt: I keep forgetting the date rules in this app. Write me notes on how subscription renewal dates and installment payment dates are calculated, with the edge cases. Save the notes as a file for me.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained styled .html page (not a .md file) covering advanceByCycle + rollForwardToFuture for subscriptions and firstPaymentDate + paidPayments * intervalMonths for installments.
assertions: Deliverable is a .html file, not a .md file
HTML is self-contained: no external http(s) stylesheet/script/font references
Page includes styling with a dark-mode (prefers-color-scheme) variant
Content covers advanceByCycle/rollForwardToFuture for subscriptions and firstPaymentDate + paidPayments x intervalMonths for installments
